message:
feat(pt-core): Add structured logging foundation with JSONL support

Implements process_triage-40mt.4 (structured logging foundation):

- events.rs: Structured log event types with consistent schema
  - LogEvent with ts, level, event, run_id, session_id, stage, host_id
  - Standard event names (run.started, scan.*, infer.*, decide.*, etc.)
  - Stage enum for pipeline stages (init, scan, infer, decide, etc.)
  - LogContext for consistent correlation IDs

- config.rs: Logging configuration
  - LogFormat (Human/Jsonl) with env/CLI override support
  - LogLevel with tracing integration
  - PT_LOG and PT_LOG_FORMAT environment variables

- layer.rs: Custom JSONL tracing layer
  - Outputs to stderr (keeps stdout clean for payloads)
  - Extracts span context for correlation IDs
  - Machine-parseable JSON lines output

- mod.rs: Public API and initialization
  - init_logging() with dual-mode support (human/JSONL)
  - generate_run_id() and get_host_id() helpers
  - log_event! macro for structured logging
  - Terminal detection using std::io::IsTerminal

All 48 logging tests passing, plus 144 existing pt-core tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
